ai_privacy_content:
When using the AI analysis feature, your crash report, game log, launcher log, and system information will be sent to Jingdu AI (DeepSeek model) for analysis.

Please note:
• Logs may contain your player name, installed mods list, etc.
• Data is transmitted via encrypted connection to the AI server
• We do not store or share your log data
• You may withdraw consent at any time in Settings

Once accepted, this prompt will not appear again for subsequent AI analyses.
ai_privacy_agreement: I have read and agree to the AI Analysis Privacy Notice

terms_content:
By using this launcher, you agree to the Minecraft EULA, Jingdu AI Privacy Agreement, and Jingdu Terms of Service.

Terms link: https://jingdu.qzz.io/terms
predownload_prompt: Pre-download files to speed up future downloads?
predownload_hint: Pre-downloading will help you install Minecraft versions faster
predownload_error_msg:
Download failed. Please check your network and try again.
You can still use the launcher normally.
online_description: P2P multiplayer via EasyTier virtual networking. No public relay server required, supports various NAT traversal. Uses Terracotta lobby code system (U/ prefix). Create or join a lobby to play with friends. Windows only.
online_create_desc: Host a multiplayer lobby and generate a Terracotta code to share with friends. Make sure your Minecraft world is open to LAN first.
online_join_desc: Enter the Terracotta lobby code (starts with U/) shared by your friend to join their world.
online_log_note: ⚠ Errors are normal and do not affect functionality
online_tips_content:
• Open your Minecraft world to LAN before creating a lobby
• After joining, the virtual LAN world will appear in Minecraft Multiplayer
• If the connection is unstable, check if your firewall allows EasyTier
• Terracotta codes are case-sensitive, make sure to enter the full code (including U/ prefix)
online_env_desc: EasyTier is the core driver for Terracotta Link. Click the button below to download it automatically if not installed.
online_env_setup_failed: EasyTier installation failed, check network and retry
online_unsupported_platform: Terracotta Link is only available on Windows.
online_invalid_code: Invalid lobby code. Please enter a valid Terracotta code (starts with U/)
online_waiting_network: Waiting for network to be ready...
online_forward_failed_et: Port forwarding failed: EasyTier is not running
online_forward_complete: Link is ready! The lobby world will appear in Minecraft Multiplayer (port: {local_port})
online_need_login: Please log in to your Jingdu AI account in Settings first to use online features
online_login_expired: Login expired, please re-login to your Jingdu AI account
online_compat_content:
These launchers all support Terracotta Link and can play together (e.g. FMCL ↔ PCL CE):

✅ Native: HMCL (the original creator of Terracotta Link)
✅ Full: PCL CE (interoperable)
✅ Compatible: BakaXL / Official PCL2 (dev channel required)
✅ Cross-platform: FCL (mobile, room codes interoperable with HMCL)

Note: The official Minecraft Launcher does not support this feature.
